name: Guiding Ariadne
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>放</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアリアドネ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Apply these effects.
● You do not pay LP to activate Counter Trap Cards.
● You do not discard to activate Counter Trap Cards.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect: You can reveal 3 Counter Traps from your Deck, your opponent chooses 1 for you to add to your hand, and you shuffle the rest back into your Deck.
